description.from: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.
description.to: One of Canada's largest museums featuring extensive collections in natural history, world cultures, and archaeology, with rotating special exhibitions and immersive galleries.
